name: KrillApp.Executor.Compute
title: Compute
description: Performs statistical analysis on historical data from a source DataPoint over a configured time range. Fetches data series for the selected period (hour, day, week, month, or year) and applies a statistical operation (average, median, high, low, sum, count, range, first, last, or standard deviation). The computed result is written to a target DataPoint.
shortDescription: Computes a statistical summary of a DataPoint's historical values over a time range and writes the result to a target.
llmPurpose: Computes a statistical summary (average, min, max, sum, count, etc.) of a source DataPoint's historical data over a time range and writes the result to a target DataPoint.
llmBehavior: fetches historical data series from source DataPoint
applies statistical operation over time range
llmOutputs: computed statistic written to target DataPoint
llmPromptHints: what was the max this week
llmCreationHints: Create a Compute node when the user needs statistical analysis of historical data. Requires a source DataPoint, a target DataPoint, a time range, and a statistical operation.

llmConnectionHints.role: analysis node that reads historical data and writes summary statistics to a target

llmExamples: Compute the daily average of this temperature sensor.
What was the maximum pressure reading this week?
Summarize the last month of data for this sensor.
Count how many readings were recorded today.
